title: NVR Recording Gap Detection for Splunk CCTV Pipelines
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:recording_health" earliest=-48h
| eval cam=coalesce(camera_id, channel, "")
| eval gap_s=tonumber(coalesce(gap_seconds, recording_gap_s, ""))
| where gap_s>120 OR recording_state!="continuous_ok"
| stats sum(gap_s) as total_gap_s by cam nvr_name
description: Missing video blocks investigations and compliance replay; health feeds expose scheduler or disk stalls before operators notice.
value: Preserves chain-of-custody confidence and SLA for retention.
implementation: (1) Ingest NVR health JSON every minute. (2) Map `recording_state`. (3) Alert on cumulative gap.
visualization: Timeline gaps; table cameras worst gap.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Sensor anomalies during cleaning, calibration, or planned environmental changes.
